name: stepfun-asr
description: Transcribe audio with StepFun's stepaudio-2.5-asr — an SSE endpoint (NOT /v1/audio/transcriptions) with 32K context, ~85-101x RTF on long audio, and a single-call ceiling around 30 minutes (no client-side chunking). Use when transcribing Chinese / English audio with StepFun, when long-form recordings (5-30 min) need to land in one request, when migrating from step-asr / step-asr-1.1, or when hitting the misleading `model stepaudio-2.5-asr not supported` error (which actually means wrong endpoint
author: daymade
